lakera.description: Screen tool outputs for prompt injection via Lakera Guard API

langfuse.description: Trace tool executions to Langfuse for observability and evaluation

destructive.description: Block destructive commands (git reset --hard, rm -rf, DROP TABLE, etc.)

malware.description: Scan file writes for obfuscated code, crypto drainers, reverse shells, exfiltration

secrets.description: Block Write/Edit that leaks secrets (API keys, private keys, tokens) or targets credential files (.env, *.pem, id_rsa, database.ini)

audit.description: Auto-run pip-audit after uv add/sync/lock/pip install — reports dependency CVEs (informational, non-blocking)
